name: smart-compact
description: Recommend a token-saving Codex profile and create a new task with it.

interface.shortDescription: Optimize the profile before a new Codex task starts.
interface.longDescription: Recommend an experimental Smart Compact lane from no-Spark or auto-Spark mode and task shape, enforce routing through zero-prompt-token task configuration, or use the manual profile picker.
defaultPrompt: Recommend a Smart Compact profile for my next task
Start an optimized Smart Compact task here
